videos.title: The creepy-crawly deck.
videos.description:
Magic: The Gathering Arena deck tech & gameplay with a black/green insect deck, featuring Grist, the Hunger Tide in Brawl.

Patreon: https://www.patreon.com/LegenVD

0:37:42 - vs Lurrus of the Dream-Den
0:57:40 - vs Tatyova, Benthic Druid
